Title: Beyond Re-Animator

Directors: Brian Yuzna
Creators: José Manuel Gómez / H.P. Lovecraft / Miguel Tejada-Flores
Actors: Jeffrey Combs / Tommy Dean Musset / Jason Barry

Introduction
    After 13 years in prison, the mad scientist from Re-Animator (1985) gets a new chance to experiment with the arrival of a young prison doctor, who secretly hopes to learn to reanimate dead people. Good intentions turn to horror.

Filming locations: Prisión Modelo, Valencia, Comunidad Valenciana, Spain
